text: Getting to sleep is easy as is staying asleep. When waking during the night, returning to sleep was not a problem. The drug did not cause sleep so deep that waking and being coherent was difficult. Using Lunesta gives a sleep session of as much as 10 hours which might be a problem for some people. The drug is taken on an as needed basis. It has been used as much as three nights in succession without any noticeable ill effects.
